game_info.title: Castle Hammerwatch Lite
game_info.concept:
A hack and slash action adventure, set in a fantasy pixel art environment. Play solo or co-op in this adventure from bottom to top of Castle Hammerwatch. Kill hordes of enemies with varied looks and features through four unique environments with traps, hidden secrets and puzzles. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/239070/Hammerwatch/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ A hack and slash action adventure, set in a fantasy pixel art environment. Play solo or co-op in this adventure from bottom to top of Castle Hammerwatch. Kill hordes of enemies with varied looks and features through four unique environments with traps, hidden secrets and puzzles. A hack and slash action adventure, set in a fantasy pixel art environment. Play solo or co-op in this adventure from bottom to top of Castle Hammerwatch. Kill hordes of enemies with varied looks and features through four unique environments with traps, hidden secrets and puzzles.

Key Features

  • 6 different classes, with unique features and skills
  • Character development through unlocks and upgrades
  • Hard, medium and easy of course
  • Customize difficulty with several different modifiers
  • Controller support, supports various different gamepads
  • Multiplayer COOP, for up to four players, online, LAN and local
  • PC, MAC and Linux support
  • Mod and editing support, make your own levels and change other things to your liking
game_info.description:
Welcome to Castle Hammerwatch Lite! You are a brave knight venturing into the depths of a cursed castle. Your goal is to ascend the floors, defeat the evil minions residing within, and collect the Royal Treasures.

Navigate through dungeon halls, avoid deadly spike traps, and solve locked door puzzles by finding keys guarded by enemies. Watch your health, collect potions to recover, and gather gold for a high score. Combat is fast-paced—strike your foes before they strike you!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move the character (Up, Down, Left, Right)
- Z Key: Attack with your sword
- Shift Key: Dash (Quick movement burst, consumes stamina)
- Space Key: Interact (Open chests, unlock doors)
- ESC Key: Pause / Resume game
- R Key: Restart game (from Game Over or Pause)
- ENTER Key: Start game from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic player movement and collision avoidance logic.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The automated controller will move the player randomly while avoiding walls. It will attempt to navigate open spaces without getting stuck for 30 seconds.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should move continuously, changing position significantly, without getting stuck in walls or moving off-screen. The game should remain in the PLAYING phase.

TEST_2.test_description: Test combat mechanics and objective completion (Win State).
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller will aggressively pathfind towards enemies to attack them using the Z key, then seek out keys and the exit door. It will prioritize survival (health) and attacking nearest threats.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should defeat enemies, collect keys, open doors, and eventually reach the stairs to trigger the WIN state (GAME_OVER_WIN phase).

TEST_3.test_description: Stress test particle system and entity management.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Spawn inputs rapidly to trigger attacks and dashes, generating maximum particles. It will run for 10 seconds.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game maintains 60 FPS target without crashing or memory leaks despite high object count.
